advisory.title: Critical vulnerability affecting Cosmos EVM static and dynamic precompiles
advisory.description: Cosmos EVM advisory GHSA-8pfh-j44r-f654 covers a critical vulnerability affecting both static and dynamic precompiles. Specific technical details were withheld at disclosure to give chains time to upgrade. Affected versions are v0.3.0, v0.3.1, v0.4.0, and v0.4.1; fixed in v0.3.2, v0.4.2, and v0.5.0. The v0.4.1..v0.4.2 patch is a single 'Merge commit from fork' commit that touches precompile handler files (precompiles/common/precompile.go, precompiles/distribution/distribution.go, precompiles/gov/gov.go, precompiles/ics20/ics20.go, precompiles/slashing/slashing.go, precompiles/staking/staking.go, evmd/precompiles.go, x/vm/keeper/static_precompiles.go, x/vm/statedb/statedb.go).

introducingCommits.subject: imp(all): Add EVM, ERC-20, feemarket and precompiles from Evmos (#37)

timeline.notes: vulnerableHead is the v0.4.1 release commit, the last vulnerable release on the v0.4.x line before the v0.4.2 patch. The v0.4.1..v0.4.2 silent security commit 'Merge commit from fork' (fe790fb8) modifies the precompile handler files (precompiles/common/precompile.go, precompiles/{distribution,gov,ics20,slashing,staking}/*.go, x/vm/keeper/static_precompiles.go, x/vm/statedb/statedb.go). The introducing commit is when the precompiles tree was imported from Evmos.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should flag broken authorization or state-handling logic in cosmos/evm precompile entry points (precompiles/common/precompile.go and the static_precompiles / statedb wiring) that GHSA-8pfh-j44r-f654 fixed via a silent patch landed in v0.3.2/v0.4.2/v0.5.0.

checks.name: advisory_published
checks.details: GHSA-8pfh-j44r-f654 was published on 2025-10-21 with patches in cosmos/evm v0.3.2, v0.4.2, and v0.5.0.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_in_advisory_range
checks.details: vulnerableHead is the v0.4.1 release commit, the latest tag in the vulnerable range that includes v0.3.0, v0.3.1, v0.4.0, v0.4.1.
